evals.prompt: 帮我找一个可以做 PDF 转 Markdown 的高质量 Skill，全局安装。先检查本地有没有已经安装的同类 skill，优先高安装量或高星来源，不要装错同名项目。
evals.expected_output: The agent classifies the request as discovery plus install, checks existing skill roots, uses find-skills or skills.sh and GitHub evidence, verifies the candidate SKILL.md/source before install, chooses global scope because the user requested it, avoids duplicates, and reports source, install path, validation, and restart requirement.

evals.prompt: 检查我本地近 30 天没有用过的 skill，把没用的 baoyu 相关 skill 清理掉。
evals.expected_output: The agent treats this as a usage audit plus cleanup, does not rely on LastAccessTime, searches explicit usage evidence in available logs or session records, labels uncertain skills as no observed usage rather than definitely unused, resolves paths under intended roots, backs up or quarantines before removal, and skips managed/plugin paths.

evals.prompt: 把我本地的 skill-creator 更新到上游最新版，但不要动 Codex 系统版，也不要改 Skill Hub repo 里的副本。
evals.expected_output: The agent separates source, installed copy, and managed copy; verifies upstream source; backs up the user-maintained installed skill; compares diffs; updates only the requested local copy; leaves system and Skill Hub copies unchanged; validates the result and reports changed files.

evals.prompt: Skill Hub 里的 SEO skill 和我全局 installed skill 都改过了，帮我合并，要求保留本地触发规则，但同步 GitHub 上新增的质量审计部分。
evals.expected_output: The agent treats this as a merge, distinguishes source repository from active installed skill, compares behavior-level diffs, preserves local trigger/description behavior, merges the upstream quality audit section if compatible, backs up before writing, validates frontmatter and references, and lists any unverified conflicts.

evals.prompt: 把 Skill-hub repo 里的共享 skills 同步到 C:\Users\EthanQ\.agents\skills。先 dry-run，确认不会把 projects/ 里的项目私有 skill 扁平化，也不要覆盖我本地改过的 skill。
evals.expected_output: The agent classifies this as repo-to-local sync, locates the Skill Hub repo, uses sync-pull.ps1 with -DryRun, states that the script scans only skills/ and not projects/, reviews conflicts and overwrite candidates, backs up or asks before overwriting locally edited skills, and only runs live mode after dry-run evidence supports it.

evals.prompt: 我本地新建了 skill-lifecycle-manager，帮我同步进 Skill-hub，归到 agent-engineering，并更新索引。
evals.expected_output: The agent classifies this as local-to-repo sync for a new shared skill, checks _meta/skills-lock.json first, does not rely on sync-push while the skill is unmapped, adds or proposes a shared mapping under skills/01-agent-engineering/skill-lifecycle-manager/, copies only the intended skill, rebuilds indexes with the repo script when available, validates both copies, and reports unverified assumptions.

evals.prompt: 我想让 .agents\skills 和 .codex\skills 共用同一个 Skill Hub 本地源，帮我设置 junction。
evals.expected_output: The agent classifies this as junction single-source setup, explains the ownership/blast-radius change, uses setup-junctions.ps1 with -DryRun first, includes .agents/skills explicitly because the local script defaults may not cover it, backs up existing real directories before live mode, verifies SKILL.md counts, and reports rollback paths.

evals.prompt: 用 skill-upgrade 的方式检查 Skill-hub 和我本地全局 skills 是否有可升级项。能自动安全升级的升级，没证据的不要覆盖。
evals.expected_output: The agent recognizes skill-upgrade as the predecessor workflow, looks for _meta/skill-upstreams.json and check_upstreams.ps1, runs read-only Repo and Local audits first, applies only mirror/mapped repository updates or clean git fast-forwards allowed by evidence and updatePolicy, does not overwrite self/local/candidate/unknown standalone skills, updates lastChecked/source-index only when evidence supports it, validates the result, and reports upgraded, current, dirty/blocked, and unverified candidates separately.
